empty.title: Design with AI
empty.body: Pick a starter on the left, or describe what you want to design. The result renders here in a sandboxed preview.

error.title: Generation failed
error.body: Something went wrong while generating your design.

preview.clickToComment: Click any element in the preview to leave an inline comment.

chat.emptyHint: Start with a starter prompt or your own idea.

sidebar.designSystemHint: Link a repo to extract colors, typography, spacing, and other styling cues for future generations.
sidebar.startHint: Start with a brief, then add files, a URL, or a local repo to ground the result.

providers.empty: No providers configured yet. Add one to start generating.

fields.baseUrlOptional: Base URL (optional, leave blank for default)

switchConfirm.title: This provider failed last test
switchConfirm.body: Switching to {{name}} now might fail when you generate. Continue anyway?

welcome.title: Welcome to open-codesign
welcome.subtitle: Turn natural-language prompts into design artifacts. Pick how you want to start.

paste.title: Paste your API key
paste.howToGet: How do I get a key?

errors.401: That key was rejected. Check it in your provider dashboard.
errors.402: Your account has no credit. Top up and retry.
errors.429: Rate limited. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.network: Network error reaching the provider. Check your connection.

advanced.title: Advanced — custom base URL
advanced.description: If you use a proxy or relay, paste the full base URL (must include /v1).

preset.label: Preset
preset.hint: Not sure which to pick? Choose the first one for OpenAI official, or pick by relay name.

errors.404: Base URL path wrong. Try adding /v1 suffix (e.g. https://your-host/v1).
errors.ECONNREFUSED: Cannot reach base URL. Check domain/port/network.

commands.title: Commands

hints.export: Use the export button in the toolbar

commands.exportUseToolbarBody: Use the Export button in the toolbar.

inlineComment.title: Comment on
inlineComment.description: Clicked elements stay selected in the canvas. Describe the visual or content change you want, and open-codesign will rewrite the artifact around that target.
inlineComment.placeholder: Make this section more compact, sharpen the headline, and align it with the linked design system…

errors.providerAuthMissing: No API key configured. Open Settings to add one.
errors.ipcBadInput: Invalid input passed to the main process.
errors.exporterNotReady: Exporter is still loading. Try again in a moment.
errors.rendererDisconnected: Renderer is not connected to the main process.

meditationApp.title: Calm Spaces meditation app
meditationApp.description: Mobile prototype with phone frame, soft palette, interactive nav.
meditationApp.prompt: Design a mobile app prototype for a meditation app called Calm Spaces. Show a phone frame containing a home screen with a meditation list, play button, and progress tracker. Use serene typography, soft greens and blues, and lots of white space.

caseStudy.title: Client case study one-pager
caseStudy.description: Dark theme one-page PDF-ready layout with hero metrics.
caseStudy.prompt: Create a one-page client case study. The client increased qualified leads 40% using our platform. Include before/after metrics, a CEO quote, and a logo placeholder. Clean, minimal, dark theme.

pitchDeck.title: B2B SaaS pitch deck
pitchDeck.description: 8-12 slides for a healthcare-targeted SaaS pitch.
pitchDeck.prompt: Design a pitch deck for a B2B SaaS company targeting mid-market healthcare. 8 to 10 slides covering problem, market, product, traction, team, and ask.

marketingLanding.title: Marketing landing page
marketingLanding.description: Hero + features + CTA, tunable accent color.
marketingLanding.prompt: Design a modern marketing landing page for an AI productivity tool. Include a hero section, three feature cards, social proof, and a call to action. Use a warm neutral palette.
